lines.text: Short-duration loss reserves: case $145,000,000, IBNR $89,000,000, total incurred $234,000,000 per ASC 944 944-40-55-1, 944-40-55-8.
Claims development triangle disclosed for accident years 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024, 2025 per ASC 944 944-40-55-12, 944-40-55-15.

Premiums receivable CECL allowance $770,000 on gross premiums receivable $38,500,000 (ASC 326 narrow scope — premiums receivable only; not applied to loss reserves or DAC) per ASC 326 326-20-50-6, 944 narrow scope premiums receivable.

Reinsurance recoverable gross $67,500,000 with credit allowance $3,300,000 (ASC 326 narrow scope — recoverables only) at 15.0% cession per ASC 326 944-20-50-1, 326 narrow scope reinsurance recoverables.
Liability for future policy benefits $320,000,000 under LDTI (ldtiApplicabilityFlag true) per ASC 944 944-40-25-1, 944-40-55-1, ASU 2018-12 LDTI.
Deferred acquisition costs balance $28,000,000 amortized on constant-level basis per ASC 944 944-30-35-1, ASU 2018-12 DAC amortization.
Market risk benefits fair value $12,500,000 recognized before embedded derivative evaluation per ASC 944 944-40-25-25C, ASU 2018-12 MRB (post-LDTI MRB priority over ASC 815-15).

paragraphs: NAIC SAP to US GAAP reconciliation

lines.text: NAIC P&C-yellow statutory net income $28,500,000 and surplus $187,000,000 reconciled to US GAAP per ASC 944 944-20-S99, NAIC SAP to US GAAP reconciliation.
NAIC risk-based capital ratio 450% (no-action action level) per ASC 944 944-40-S99, NAIC RBC action level.
